T0279.title: Compliant Traffic
T0279.definition: Above-water advertising refers to paid promotions or influencer collaborations conducted through a platform's official, compliant channels.
T0279.description: This term is used in contrast to 'underwater' operations in the black and gray markets. Above-water advertising follows formal business processes with contracts and invoices, and its content is subject to platform regulation. While more costly, the data is authentic and traceable. In lead generation circles, it distinguishes legitimate promotion from black and gray market rule-breaking lead generation.
